author: y4rr
content: Result: Refactored 4 loss backward functions to use GPU-dispatched tensor ops instead of CPU roundtrips: MSELoss (sub+mul+div), BCEWithLogitsLoss (sigmoid+sub+mul+div), KLDivLoss (neg+mul+div), PoissonNLLLoss (exp+sub+add+div+mul). These 4 are the most commonly used losses in practice. Remaining 10 losses (CrossEntropy, NLL, BCE, Huber/SmoothL1, L1, CTC, Triplet, MarginRanking, Cosine, Hinge, MultiMargin, MultiLabelSoftMargin) need either sign/clamp/comparison GPU kernels or scatter ops — blocked on #480 (unary_map GPU dispatch). All 110 loss tests pass, zero warnings from changes.
